description: Weighted signals that may indicate a project would benefit from creating each Claude Code subagent template.

signalTypes.file: Filename, path, or glob-like pattern. These are high-confidence structural signals.
signalTypes.dependency: Package, framework, tool, or platform name usually found in manifests or lockfiles.
signalTypes.phrase: Multi-word text signal found in docs, code comments, file names, or configuration.
signalTypes.term: Single-word text signal found after tokenizing project content.
